source_doc:
@hacks4pancakes What do you think is actually going on?
Confused? Anxious? Executive Dysfunction? Unrealistic? Bone idle?
(I'm NOT confusing ND with idleness in my internal ontology here, but I wonder if either might be contributing...)

@hacks4pancakes @DamonHD Foe emigration at least, I can imagine myself saying “oh I’m so jealous, I would LOVE to do that” when the truth is there are internal or external reasons why I wouldn’t/couldn’t and someone offering to help me with the logistics wouldn’t change that so I politely decline.

@darryl @hacks4pancakes The grown-up way to politely decline would be "I got ahead of myself: I cannot do that for other reasons much as I'd like to", not brushing it off as a diary issue!

source_doc:
Traction meets fashion: The best weatherproof trainers for rain-slicked pavements

The Cloudhorizon Waterproof feels purpose-built for the stop-start rhythm of winter commuting. Its lightweight waterproof upper keeps your feet dry without adding bulk, and the shoe's smooth rocker shape helps you roll forward easily, even when you're layered up and carrying heavy loads.

Underfoot, Helion foam creates a cushioned bounce that softens long walks between stations, while the grippy rubber outsole keeps things steady on wet steps and shiny tiles. The pared-back design gives it a polished, modern look, ideal if you prefer a trainer that handles lousy weather subtly, without shouting its technical credentials.

I had them for the very first time when I last came to Portugal, and I was obsessed.
I ate about 50 of these.
Probably no exaggeration.
I ate so many of these when I was when I was last here.
And then I tried them in like other countries afterwards.
And they never hit the same.
They never hit the same.
So I'm having these again in Portugal.
Let's try them.

source_doc:
i am hesitant to declare it but i may be right around the point of behavior calculation optimization where there's nothing more that can be done without actually decimating the number of paths being processed.
And that might actually be the play because things like UCT are smarter about traversing a tree with a budget and splitting how deep vs broad you go

at the end of the day, it's always going to be possible that some enemy picks up some combination of abilities/items where the combinatorial explosion of possibility space is unable to calculate fast on any hardware, so I was always going to need to cap it somewhere, just that theoretical cap is now 40x bigger than it was in january

Welp think I'm going to implement UCT because my game's just Go now this is going to be a journey

source_doc:
@ptoothfish why do all of the kids’ IMDb headshots look like they’re screen grabs from This Person Does Not Exist dot com? 😬

@bloodflowersburning yup the whole production machine is giving uncanny valley
even if they are real kids underneath, i wonder how much tuning up their images get 😬
smiles widened, dimples accentuated, etc
i stand by my assertion they will be treated like hot-swappable parts if they do anything complicated like have an opinion or grow into their faces wrong

@ptoothfish oh they absolutely will. There’s probably even some contract clauses that lands them in deep weta if they even sneeze wrong.

hypo_0:
@ptoothfish kenapa semua foto kepala IMDb anak-anak terlihat kayak cuplikan dari This Person Does Not Exist dot com? 😬

@bloodflowersburning yup seluruh mesin produksi ini memberikan kesan uncanny valley
meskipun mereka adalah anak-anak nyata, aku penasaran seberapa banyak gambar mereka dirombak 😬
senyum diperlebar, lesung pipit ditekankan, dan lain-lain
aku tetap pada pendapatku bahwa mereka akan diperlakukan seperti bagian yang bisa diganti-ganti kalau mereka melakukan hal yang rumit seperti punya pendapat atau tumbuh jadi wajah yang salah

@ptoothfish oh pasti mereka akan. Mungkin bahkan ada beberapa klausul kontrak yang bikin mereka terjebak di masalah besar jika mereka hanya bersin salah.
hypo_1:
@ptoothfish kenapa semua foto IMDb anak-anak kayak cuplikan dari This Person Does Not Exist dot com? 😬

@bloodflowersburning bener banget, keseluruhan mesin produksinya memberikan kesan uncanny valley
meskipun mereka anak-anak yang nyata, aku penasaran seberapa banyak gambar mereka diubah 😬
senyum diperlebar, lesung pipit diperkuat, dan lain-lain
aku yakin mereka bakal diperlakukan seperti bagian yang bisa diganti-ganti jika mereka berani berpikir atau tumbuh dengan cara yang 'salah'

@ptoothfish oh pasti! Mungkin bahkan ada klausul kontrak yang bikin mereka terjerat masalah besar hanya karena bersin salah.
hypo_2:

@Maker_of_Things
Is there any bruising or swelling? If it’s swelling then let the practice know and keep an eye on it.
Assuming she took it from the veins around the elbow, theres a chance she went too deep and hit the back wall of the vein, and an underlying tendon then bruised it on the way out. All depends on technique and equipment. I could never get the hang of a fixed needle draw but was a deft hand at a butterfly draw, you could be much kinder.
Hope it’s eased now.

@tempusfelix
Yeah, from my elbow. It is still sore, but getting better. No bruising or bleeding though.

@Maker_of_Things
Good. She may well have been too deep so remember if they’re not urgent, you can often ask for a specific practitioner if your surgery allows it. For example I like the sister at mine, she’s so smooth.

source_doc:
Ironing the lightweight green corduroy for my first try at the Sachi's Studio Newsboy Cap pattern. I don't know how I feel about the recommendation to use interfacing but it probably does want something to stiffen and thicken it a bit.
#millinery

Sachi's newsboy cap pattern advises to cut the crown pieces diagonal to the weave ("on the bias") to allow more stretch around the circumference but that will make the corduroy rows run aslant, where I prefer them vertical.
We shall see. This is the test cookie to get a feel for the pattern. I like corduroy for texture but green wouldn't be my first choice, and this fabric is lightweight enough that I should add a layer, whether interfacing or what-have-you from the stash.

On a second look, my fabric isn't corduroy at all, it's just velvet, so I can cut at 45° to the fabric weave like Sachi suggests in the Newsboy Cap pattern and it won't look strange.
#millinery

hypo_0:
Menetralkan corduroy hijau yang ringan untuk percobaan pertamaku di pola Topi Newsboy Sachi. Aku nggak tahu bagaimana perasaanku tentang rekomendasi untuk menggunakan interfacing, tapi mungkin memang butuh sesuatu untuk memperkuat dan menebalkannya sedikit.
#kerajinan

Pola topi newsboy Sachi menyarankan untuk memotong bagian mahkota secara diagonal terhadap anyaman ("on the bias") untuk memberikan lebih banyak elastisitas di sekitar keliling, tapi itu akan membuat barisan corduroy berjalan miring, padahal aku lebih suka mereka tegak.
Kita lihat saja. Ini adalah kue percobaan untuk merasakan pola ini. Aku suka corduroy karena teksturnya, tapi hijau bukan pilihan pertamaku, dan kain ini cukup ringan sehingga aku harus menambahkan lapisan, entah itu interfacing atau apa pun dari persediaan.

Setelah melihat sekali lagi, kainku sebenarnya bukan corduroy sama sekali, ini cuma beludru, jadi aku bisa memotong dengan sudut 45° terhadap anyaman kain seperti yang Sachi sarankan dalam pola Topi Newsboy dan itu nggak akan terlihat aneh.
#kerajinan

source_doc:
@kagan Just use anything, even the cashier receipts from your grocery shopping - whatever you want. A friend of mine who exhibits a lot put a sheet of toilet roll from every place he's exhibiting in his scrapbook another friend got injured while hanging her frames and eventually used the cast from the injury and some gouache to stamp patters on the pages. Hence: everything's involved you want involved.

@aurora And then you... take all these things, and glue, staple, or otherwise attach them into a book? Is that it?
I'm unclear on what happens next, or why.
Honestly, I may just not be a scrapbooking person.

@kagan Yes, that's exactly the way to go! Intentionally spill your coffee, drop an ink cartridge... whatever suits you. One just needs to get all these fancy ideas shown on pinterest or whatever out of one's head. It's about documenting the process instead of being a visual dainty. Use it like a wrecking journal if that suits. It's totally up to the person who makes it.

#valleylink high vol transmission line #orangecountyVA public hearing #grid upgrade yes. for #ai #datacenters no. #eminentdomain taking of farmland NO

0% none of the #valleylink transmission line is in existing rights of way in #ocva. none of the #power will serve #orangecountyva. 100% headed north to #ai #datacenters in loudon county #va. #fauquier said no to the substation now targeted for #culpepercounty #yeatssubstation

#valleylink claim all #rightsofway fully subscribed for (local) power so must go outside #Row 100%

#valleylink 765kv #transmission lines carry power from ohio wv to swv to central va to #nova. look at that on a map. long way round. #rural counties seemed easier than #nova

#valleylink thunk wrong.

source_doc:
These beautiful things that I've got.
And then Benson, that front flip.
What were you thinking?
I was not thinking.
You had started doing flips when I was a little a little boy, and I thought he was the coolest.
So when I was like three, I would try them off my couch and it progressed and progressed to the front yard and then on stage.

source_doc:
I'm doing a eekly 1hr meeting where I'm going over with a director of engineering my soap box on managing a product management organization and actually it's coming out to be a pretty good episodic thing

Topics have been
- different types of product managers and the basic skill sets in developing requirements
- how product managers ensure an ongoing cadence for an engineering team
- dealing with product managers with varying backgrounds (engineering, data analyst, operational SME, consulting etc)
what's been fun is that this Director and I worked at a previous company with product managers that I didn't manage and I'm able to reference "hey remember that person? that person was awesome and here's why."

so in various email chains and slack threads I'll forward them to said director (if he's already not in there) and be like "ok a GOOD product manager would do THIS" and a "BAD product maanger would do THAT" rememember when so and so did THIS? that was good.

source_doc:
@rechelon extremely unpopular is one way of putting it… i don’t live in berlin but i think people everywhere had roughly the same response, which is “fuck these assholes for doing something that leaves so many uninvolved people without electricity and treating it like necessary collateral damage”. I’ve seen lots of people speculate that it was a false flag to make the left look bad. Not that the cops care, they are probably giddy with excitement now (a gross thing to imagine) that they have a pretense to raid and criminalize the leftist scene.

@enby_of_the_apocalypse
Yeah, I mean it seems like there's still about half a dozen anticivs raised on meme accounts who are shocked the scene didn't stand with them, but are extremely shocked that old timer anticivs who felt disrespected by said crew and haven't backed them.

@enby_of_the_apocalypse
I do worry that we'll see a self-justification spiral where a handful of anticivs get so mad at the movement for not supporting their super based attack on the civilized that they end up in ITS level shit within a year or two of isolation and seething.

source_doc:
@la Isn't rule #1 of machining that if you haven't faced it off, it's not square or flat?

@azonenberg yes, of course, but I *did* mean to face it off. I just had my tool zero set wrong.
Because I assumed that it was roughtly flat.
I'm making an extra part today. I have the stock. And if I don't it will bug me to no end. Plus, during test fitting the bearing I broke the glue holding the part on my plate, so I would have to indicate it back in anyways, which I don't wanna dooooo, so.....

@la I know the feeling.
Had a similar problem when working on my house where literally every datum you might think of using was wrong.
I had a contractor frame a door frame plumb and square. Had to rip out a couple of studs after he left because the door needed to be like a degree off level in order to be flush with the floor and not floating in the air on one side.
Another (partial height) wall has each stud carefully cut to length because no two are the same size... The floor isn't flat so to make the countertop level you need the wall to be a parallelogram rather than a rectangle

@azonenberg iya, tentu saja, tapi aku *benar-benar* bermaksud untuk meratakannya. Aku hanya salah menyetel nol pada alatku.
Sebab aku mengira itu kira-kira datar.
Aku sedang membuat bagian tambahan hari ini. Aku punya bahan bakunya. Dan jika aku tidak memakainya, itu akan sangat menggangguku. Plus, saat mencoba memasang bantalan, aku merusak lem yang menempelkan bagian itu di pelatku, jadi aku harus mengukurnya kembali, yang sebenarnya tidak ingin aku lakukan, jadi.....

@la Aku mengerti perasaan itu.
Aku punya masalah serupa saat bekerja di rumahku di mana semua data yang mungkin kamu pikirkan itu salah.
Aku menyuruh kontraktor untuk meratakan dan menyusun bingkai pintu. Setelah dia pergi, aku harus membongkar beberapa balok karena pintunya harus miring sekitar satu derajat agar rata dengan lantai dan tidak menggantung di udara di satu sisi.

@azonenberg iya, tentu saja, tapi aku *benar-benar* bermaksud untuk meratakannya. Aku cuma salah mengatur nol di alatku.
Karenaku kira itu kira-kira datar.
Aku sedang membuat bagian tambahan hari ini. Bahan bakunya sudah ada. Dan kalau nggak, itu bakal menggangguku terus. Plus, pas mencoba memasang bantalan, aku malah merusak lem yang nempel di bagian pelatku, jadi aku harus mengukurnya lagi, yang sebenarnya nggak mau aku lakukan, jadi.....

@la Aku ngerti banget perasaan itu.
Aku juga pernah punya masalah serupa saat kerja di rumahku di mana hampir semua data yang kupikir bisa dipakai itu salah.
Aku menyuruh kontraktor untuk meratakan dan menyusun bingkai pintu. Setelah dia pergi, aku harus membongkar beberapa balok karena pintunya harus miring sekitar satu derajat agar bisa rata dengan lantai dan tidak menggantung di udara di satu sisi.
Dinding lain (setinggi sebagian) setiap balok dipotong dengan hati-hati karena tidak ada yang memiliki ukuran yang sama... Lantainya nggak datar, jadi untuk membuat meja dapur rata, kamu butuh dinding yang berbentuk jajar genjang daripada persegi panjang.

source_doc:
@afewbugs I have seen this too, I do worry that new members might not find such groups in the real world now as they are less likely to be on old fashioned social media. For instance someone was trying to give away two pedal cycles in need of repair and couldn't get any interest through Facebook. A few years ago they wouldn't have lasted ten minutes before someone claimed them. I have one and I am gutted that I wasn't able to take the second. Similarly, litter picking and community gardens.

@hicksy2 @afewbugs I have more luck shifting things through Facebook marketplace these days than I do with Gumtree any more, and I can't face eBay for things too big to post. Possibly it depends a lot on where you are though, especially with bikes!

@lnr @hicksy2 Marketplace is a big one keeping me on Facebook too. I used to think it was to keep in touch with friends but I barely see any posts from my actual friends anymore, so now it's mostly marketplace, local groups and the fact most local businesses and even the Library only seem to have their opening times, special events etc on Facebook
instruction: You are a professional Indonesian translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Indonesian (ind_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Indonesian grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Indonesian. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Indonesian translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Indonesian (ind_Latn):
hypo_0:
@afewbugs Aku juga udah liat ini, aku khawatir anggota baru mungkin nggak bisa nemuin grup-grup kayak gini di dunia nyata sekarang karena mereka mungkin nggak aktif di media sosial yang kuno. Misalnya, ada yang mau memberikan dua sepeda yang butuh perbaikan dan nggak bisa dapat minat sama sekali lewat Facebook. Beberapa tahun lalu, sepeda-sepeda itu nggak akan bertahan lebih dari sepuluh menit sebelum ada yang mengklaimnya. Aku punya satu dan aku sedih banget karena nggak bisa ambil yang kedua. Begitu juga dengan pengambilan sampah dan kebun komunitas.

@hicksy2 @afewbugs Aku lebih beruntung ngasih barang lewat marketplace Facebook belakangan ini daripada lewat Gumtree, dan aku nggak mau buka eBay untuk barang-barang yang terlalu besar untuk dikirim. Mungkin itu sangat tergantung di mana kamu berada, terutama dengan sepeda!

@lnr @hicksy2 Marketplace adalah hal besar yang bikin aku tetap di Facebook juga. Dulu aku pikir ini untuk menjaga hubungan dengan teman-teman, tapi sekarang aku hampir nggak liat postingan dari teman-teman riasku, jadi sekarang ini kebanyakan marketplace, grup lokal dan kenyataannya sebagian besar bisnis lokal dan bahkan Perpustakaan cuma sepertinya punya jam buka, acara khusus, dll di Facebook.

source_doc:
I just had a very nice #dream that I made friends with Lee Chaeyeon. I just started talking to her nand the next thing I know, I have stayed over her house (like when the French kidnapped me for Christmas) and she is telling me to go up stairs and "shuffle up a little bit" (her English was generally excellent) by which she meant "tidy up a little bit" to show her mom we were ready to eat.
She comes upstairs to "shuffle up" her room and starts making gestures to explain what she means ...
1/

(she was always so excited to see me in this dream) because I was taking my coat off instead of "shuffling up."
Then she indicates this little piece of paper and says she has left me an autograph but in return she wants this little trading card I made in second grade of "50 Spikes," a sonic knock-off, obviously with more spikes. (This card actually exists IRL BTW). I start explaining to her what it is and if she really wants it (she did) I at least needed a picture of her holding it.
2/

Partly because I would miss it, but also, otherwise no one would believe me that she had wanted this thing from me.
It was then I realized we still didn't have each others' phone numbers.
3/3

source_doc:
Progress after a while off. I got the sewing machine out to do the bill and a crown seam. Half the crown sewn plus the bill, resting atop the paper form made from the pattern. I had to rip and re-sew the machine stitch because I pinned along instead of across the seam and went off track. I might re-do the bill if I want a little more depth.
#millinery

Eight crown panels and two bill panels assembled into three pieces and pinned for general shape. Sachi's Studio Newsboy Cap pattern in green velvet. Mostly machine stitched.
The pattern calls for topstitching along the seams of the crown panels, which might suggest either matching or contrasting thread.
#millinery

Top view before I sew the crown halves together. Reviewing the how-to video. I see Sachi is using a few tiny spring clips during sewing instead of pinning the whole seam.

A bit of a messy join on the eight panels coming together at the peak of the newsboy cap, so I am thinking a larger button may be in order to disguise the seams.

Crown fully pieced, with cloth covered.button at peak. Raw edges loosely tucked under. Seams neither pressed nor topstitched.
#millinery

Progres setelah beberapa waktu. Aku keluarkan mesin jahit untuk membuat bill dan seam crown. Setengah dari crown sudah dijahit ditambah bill, istirahat di atas kertas yang dibuat dari pola. Aku harus merobek dan menjahit ulang jahitan mesin karena aku menyematkan diagonal bukan melintang di seam dan jadi salah jalur. Mungkin aku akan mengulang bill kalau mau sedikit lebih dalam.
#milleri

Delapan panel crown dan dua panel bill dirakit menjadi tiga bagian dan disematkan untuk bentuk umum. Pola topi Newsboy Sachi dalam beludru hijau. Sebagian besar dijahit dengan mesin.
Pola ini membutuhkan jahitan atas di sepanjang seam panel crown, yang mungkin menyarankan benang yang cocok atau kontras.
#milleri

Pandangan atas sebelum aku menjahit dua setengah crown bersama-sama. Melihat video cara-caranya. Aku melihat Sachi menggunakan beberapa klip kecil saat menjahit daripada menyematkan seluruh seam.

Ada sedikit sambungan yang berantakan di delapan panel yang bertemu di puncak topi newsboy, jadi aku berpikir tombol yang lebih besar mungkin dibutuhkan untuk menutupi seam-seamnya.

Crown sepenuhnya dirakit, dengan tombol yang dilapisi kain di puncaknya. Sisi-sisi kasar ditekuk longgar ke bawah. Seam belum ditekan atau dijahit atas.
#milleri

Aku terpaksa merobek dan menjahit ulang jahitan mesin karena aku menyematkan sejajar dengan seam, bukan melintang, jadi melenceng. Mungkin aku akan mengulang bill kalau ingin sedikit lebih dalam.
#milleri

Delapan panel crown dan dua panel bill sudah disatukan menjadi tiga bagian dan disematkan untuk membentuk secara umum. Pola topi Newsboy dari Sachi dalam beludru hijau. Sebagian besar dijahit mesin.
Pola ini mengharuskan jahitan atas di sepanjang seam panel crown, yang bisa berarti benang yang sewarna atau kontras.
#milleri

Pandangan atas sebelum aku menjahit kedua bagian crown bersama. Aku sedang menonton video tutorial. Aku lihat Sachi menggunakan beberapa klip kecil saat menjahit daripada menyematkan seluruh seam.

Ada sedikit sambungan yang berantakan di delapan panel yang bertemu di puncak topi newsboy, jadi aku berpikir tombol yang lebih besar mungkin diperlukan untuk menyamarkan seam-seam itu.

Crown sudah sepenuhnya dirakit, dengan tombol yang dilapisi kain di bagian puncaknya. Sisi-sisi kasar ditekuk longgar ke bawah. Seam belum ditekan atau dijahit atas.
#milleri

source_doc:
She talked about how impossible it is to be a woman in today's society.
She spoke for over two minutes without being interrupted by a single man, saying things like, you have to be a boss, but you can't be mean.
You have to be thin but not too thin.
You have to never get old, never be rude, never show up.
Oh, sorry.
Our male director is telling me I need to wrap it up here to present America with her.
To see her award.
Is the woman that she delivered that speech to.
Please welcome Margot Robbie.

source_doc:
I wish alcohol wasn't such a normal gift in society 😅 My employer sent me a bottle of eggnog but the only alcohol we like is in alcohol markers

I guess "not liking it" is kinda poor wording, I just think it's weird how casual we are with this stuff and we somehow just assume that all adults love this shit when there's people who shouldn't be touching it ever, and frankly I think the world would be better off if I poured it into the toilet than even gifting it to someone

@doombloomart
I have had US Big Corp required sensitivity training that reminds people not everyone wants alcohol and it's inappropriate to ask why. Seems like that should be more common

@elithebearded Yeah, that's mostly what I wish for too. I get that with sending random shit to a whole corporation will never be inoffensive to everyone, but 1. don't send random shit to a whole corporation maybe and 2. alcohol just rubs me wrong in the way that many who shouldn't touch it may touch it when it randomly shows up at the doorstep. 😅
instruction: You are a professional Indonesian translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Indonesian (ind_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Indonesian grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Indonesian. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Indonesian translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. hypo_0:
Semoga alkohol bukan hadiah yang begitu biasa di masyarakat 😅 Bos saya mengirimkan saya sebotol eggnog, tapi satu-satunya alkohol yang kami suka ya di spidol alkohol

Saya rasa "tidak suka" itu kata-kata yang kurang tepat, saya cuma pikir aneh banget bagaimana kita bisa begitu santai dengan barang-barang ini dan seolah-olah kita semua berasumsi bahwa semua orang dewasa suka banget hal ini padahal ada orang yang seharusnya tidak pernah menyentuhnya, dan jujur saja saya pikir dunia akan lebih baik jika saya tuangkan ke toilet daripada memberikannya kepada seseorang

@doombloomart
Saya sudah mengikuti pelatihan sensitifitas yang diwajibkan oleh perusahaan besar AS yang mengingatkan orang-orang bahwa tidak semua orang ingin alkohol dan tidak tepat untuk bertanya kenapa. Ini seharusnya lebih umum sih

@elithebearded Iya, itu yang saya harapkan juga. Saya mengerti bahwa mengirim barang acak ke seluruh perusahaan tidak akan pernah tidak menyinggung semua orang, tapi 1. jangan kirim barang acak ke seluruh perusahaan mungkin dan 2. alkohol itu bikin saya tidak nyaman karena banyak orang yang seharusnya tidak menyentuhnya mungkin akan menyentuhnya saat tiba-tiba muncul di depan pintu. 😅

source_doc:
Tonight in #MMRPG! My back finally shuts up enough that I can GM again as the heroes continue their search for the missing girl Cammie. Vega the Digital Dragon surprises a trio of mischievous scamps who snuck into her arcade in the middle of the night but one of them recognizes her as a town superhero and they end up having a heartwarming moment geeking out over video games. Unfortunately, the moment is interrupted by somebody or something landing on the roof of the arcade... 1/?

Vega goes to investigate and finds Dr. Vesper, in his monstrous bat form that the press has dubbed the "Gargoyle Man," along with a harpy-like creature that Vesper describes as his "little protegee." Vesper says that they have come to introduce themselves and invite Vega to join their society of man-creature misfits that is led by "The Madame," Dr. Diana Laughton of the Laughton Institute. 2/?

Vega buys some time to get the mischievous scamps out of the arcade and call the rest of the Mythics for backup, then plays along at being interested in joining this "new family." Vesper and Harpy (who does not speak once during the interaction) lead Vega to a ship in the harbor, where the Laughton Institute appears to be packing up their things... presumably because they know they're drawing attention from Agent Carter and A.R.G.E.N.T. among others. 3/?
instruction: You are a professional Indonesian translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Indonesian (ind_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Indonesian grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Indonesian. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Indonesian translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Indonesian (ind_Latn):
hypo_0:
Malam ini di #MMRPG! Punggungku akhirnya cukup tenang sehingga aku bisa jadi GM lagi sementara para pahlawan melanjutkan pencarian gadis hilang Cammie. Vega Sang Naga Digital mengejutkan sekelompok trio nakal yang menyelinap ke arcade-nya di tengah malam, tetapi salah satu dari mereka mengenalinya sebagai superhero kota dan mereka akhirnya memiliki momen hangat saat ngobrol tentang video game. Sayangnya, momen itu terputus oleh seseorang atau sesuatu yang mendarat di atap arcade... 1/?

Vega pergi menyelidiki dan menemukan Dr. Vesper, dalam bentuk kelelawar monster yang oleh pers dijuluki "Gargoyle Man," bersama makhluk mirip harpy yang Vesper sebut sebagai "protege kecilnya." Vesper bilang mereka datang untuk memperkenalkan diri dan mengundang Vega bergabung dalam masyarakat orang dan makhluk aneh yang dipimpin oleh "Madame," Dr. Diana Laughton dari Laughton Institute. 2/?

Vega mencari waktu untuk mengeluarkan kelompok nakal itu dari arcade dan memanggil sisa Mythics untuk bantuan, lalu berpura-pura tertarik untuk bergabung dengan "keluarga baru" ini. Vesper dan Harpy (yang tidak berbicara sekali pun selama interaksi) membawa Vega ke sebuah kapal di pelabuhan, di mana Laughton Institute sepertinya sedang mengemas barang-barang mereka... mungkin karena mereka tahu mereka menarik perhatian dari Agent Carter dan A.R.G.E.N.T. di antara lainnya. 3/?

@hannorein@mastodon.social sooo, we’re tagging verified human content now for them to have a dataset with less slop to train on?
I don’t know, they should asphyxiate from their own barfed up slop mess they’ve created until their latent vector space converges to unity.

@helpsterTee @hannorein My first thought as well. I killed off my personal site since I didn't want to feed the various Torment Nexuses. Marking genuine human content just makes building new, unpoisoned and slop free data sets easier.
I thought about doing the opposite and building a "poison pot" for AI crawlers but my poor little server is not that beefy.

@CodingPhysicist@mstdn.social @hannorein@mastodon.social yeah, if we suffer, let them suffer.
If your employer stuffs AI in your daily routine, instead of resigning, use malicious compliance and apply it to totally mundane problems and embrace slightly-wrong answers while burning through corporate token credit to ruin quarterly performance.
I’m so fed up with this and they’re using it anyways against us, so let’s have a little fun, while we can 🫤
Edit: they’re making up numbers all the time and faking profits for a while now, the usage that’ll bankrupt your employer won’t place a dent at slop headquarters unprofitable scam business anyways or their forest burning slopetuum mobile.

hypo_0:
@hannorein@mastodon.social jadi, sekarang kita menandai konten manusia terverifikasi supaya mereka punya dataset yang lebih bersih untuk dilatih?
Gak tahu deh, mereka harus tercekik dari sampah yang mereka ciptakan sendiri sampai ruang vektor laten mereka konvergen ke satu.

@helpsterTee @hannorein Pikiranku yang pertama juga. Aku matiin situs pribadiku karena gak mau memberi makan berbagai Nexus Penyiksaan. Menandai konten manusia yang asli bikin nyusun dataset baru yang tidak terkontaminasi dan bebas sampah jadi lebih gampang.
Aku sempat terpikir untuk melakukan sebaliknya dan bikin "panci racun" untuk crawler AI, tapi serverku yang kecil itu nggak kuat.

@CodingPhysicist@mstdn.social @hannorein@mastodon.social ya, kalau kita menderita, biar mereka juga menderita.
Kalau atasanmu nempelkan AI di rutinitas harianmu, daripada mengundurkan diri, gunakan kepatuhan jahat dan terapkan itu pada masalah yang benar-benar sepele dan terima jawaban yang sedikit salah sambil menghabiskan kredit token perusahaan untuk merusak kinerja kuartalan.
Aku udah muak sama ini dan mereka tetap menggunakannya melawan kita, jadi mari kita bersenang-senang sedikit, selama kita bisa 🫤
Edit: mereka selalu memanipulasi angka dan berpura-pura untung sejak beberapa waktu lalu, penggunaan yang akan membuat atasanmu bangkrut nggak akan ngasih dampak apapun di markas besar scam yang tidak menguntungkan atau kesenangan mereka yang membakar hutan.

source_doc:
@Edent ah, interesting - was the Hub 5 something you had to request from Virgin, or did you just get one elsewhere and set it up? (As per recent discussion was issued with a 5x, with its lack Modem Mode.)

@yvan I already had the Hub 4. I went onto their online chat and whinged about poor download speeds until they sent me a new Hub.
If you're on the XPON network, I don't think you have a choice though.

@Edent ah yeah, just been trying to do some research, but it's all a bit muddy... I'm FTTP/XGS-PON so I think just stuck with the 5x... not an insurmountable problem, just a little annoying. (But compared to unreliable <40mpbs BT rotting fenland copper that cost me more than Virgin... I'm not really complaining.)

hypo_0:
@Edent ah, menarik - apakah Hub 5 itu sesuatu yang harus kamu minta dari Virgin, atau kamu dapat dari tempat lain dan mengaturnya sendiri? (Sesuai diskusi terbaru, saya diberikan yang 5x, dengan kurangnya Mode Modem.)

@yvan Saya sudah punya Hub 4. Saya masuk ke chat online mereka dan mengeluh tentang kecepatan unduh yang buruk sampai mereka mengirimkan saya Hub baru.
Kalau kamu di jaringan XPON, saya rasa kamu tidak punya pilihan sih.

@Edent ah iya, saya sudah mencoba melakukan riset, tapi semuanya agak membingungkan... Saya FTTP/XGS-PON jadi sepertinya hanya terjebak dengan 5x... bukan masalah yang tidak bisa diatasi, hanya sedikit menjengkelkan. (Tapi dibandingkan dengan BT yang tidak dapat diandalkan <40mpbs di copper fenland yang merusak dan biayanya lebih dari Virgin... saya sih tidak benar-benar mengeluh.)

4/
#SpookyKittiesSciences

2026-03-23 Hum The X-Men Animated Series Theme To Yourself: Whatever X22 was doing, I don't believe he is the reason everyone is interested. I have only found 1 additional The Inspector visit to the spot the day before. The camera recording the area only keeps the most recent 100GB, so I only have a limited time frame to check. So far, I have found no other traffic during the day. While secret kitty traffic at night is a possibility, it is unlikely.
6/
#SpookyKittiesSciences

source_doc:
Whoa, you mean Blender Market, the thing I said was the first step towards the Blender environment becoming a shitty subscription service, renamed itself to the oh-so-appealing name "Superhive" and then decided to mandate subscriptions?
WHOA WHO COULD HAVE GUESSED?! Not me, that's for sure. This is completely out of left field!

TBH, I have never seen a single company with "Hive" in the name that wasn't a complete shitshow run by assholes, so I never bought anything on that platform -
Sorry
I didn't RENT anything on that platform if I could help it.
Maybe it's unfair, but "clearly we, a company that specializes in connecting creators with their audience, should name ourselves HIVE, because the creators are just our loyal little bees, and audience is our loyal little bees, work for us!" always gives me bad vibes.

"Hive implies busy crowds!"
Hive implies a queen.

hypo_0:
Wah, maksudmu Blender Market, yang aku bilang adalah langkah pertama menuju lingkungan Blender yang jadi layanan langganan jelek, berganti nama jadi nama yang sangat menarik "Superhive" dan kemudian memutuskan untuk mewajibkan langganan?
WOW, SIAPA YANG BISA MENEBAK?! Bukan aku, itu pasti. Ini benar-benar di luar dugaan!

Jujur, aku belum pernah melihat satu pun perusahaan dengan "Hive" di namanya yang bukan merupakan kekacauan total yang dikelola oleh orang-orang brengsek, jadi aku tidak pernah membeli apa pun di platform itu -
Maaf
Aku tidak MENYEWA apa pun di platform itu jika aku bisa menghindarinya.
Mungkin ini tidak adil, tapi "jelas kita, sebuah perusahaan yang mengkhususkan diri dalam menghubungkan kreator dengan audiens mereka, harus menamai diri kita HIVE, karena kreator hanyalah lebah kecil setia kami, dan audiens adalah lebah kecil setia kami, bekerja untuk kami!" selalu memberiku vibe yang buruk.

"Hive mengimplikasikan kerumunan yang sibuk!"
Hive mengimplikasikan seorang ratu.

source_doc:
In a surprise Inspector Clouseau twist, I now have an extra thing to investigate for Spooky Kitties Sciences!
I was doing a quick scroll through the evenings secondary camera video, when I spotted a curious The Inspector standing on the trunk of the tree near the feeding station. Kept jumping around, finding him near where the magpies had been, so I initially suspect(edit) he was simply chasing them as they sometimes let him do, until I randomly chance stop...
#SpookyKittiesSciences

There Inspector Clouseau was, rolling around like crazing about 2 meters NE of the tree, mostly hidden by the unfortunate placement of the awnings east post. Still, there he was for 5 minutes, at which point he ran back up the tree, walked across the lawn to the hill, flattened himself at the bottom, and then ran off camera, presumably in the middle of The Zoomies.
2/
#SpookyKittiesSciences

Now, as some of my Spooky Kitties Sciences readers may know, the motivations behind that tests are not just to entertain the kitties. While the most important aspect is the genuine curiosity I had seeing the kitties rolling around in the snow, I really wanted to find something that The Inspector liked. I came out of the initial testing with only a single moment to hint that he liked something. What that was is still a mystery.
3/
#SpookyKittiesSciences

Aku sedang scrolling cepat melalui video kamera sekunder malam itu, saat melihat The Inspector yang penasaran berdiri di atas batang pohon dekat stasiun makan. Terus melompat-lompat, ku temukan dia dekat tempat di mana burung magpie berada, jadi awalnya aku curiga (edit) dia cuma mengejar mereka seperti yang kadang mereka biarkan, sampai aku kebetulan berhenti...
#SpookyKittiesSciences

Di situ ada Inspector Clouseau, mengguling-guling seperti orang gila sekitar 2 meter NE dari pohon, sebagian besar tertutup oleh penempatan sial dari tiang kanopi di timur. Meski begitu, dia di sana selama 5 menit, saat itu dia berlari kembali ke pohon, berjalan melintasi rumput ke bukit, merenggangkan diri di bawah, dan kemudian melarikan diri dari kamera, mungkin di tengah-tengah The Zoomies.
2/
#SpookyKittiesSciences

Sementara aspek yang paling penting adalah rasa ingin tahu yang tulus saat melihat kitties mengguling-guling di salju, aku sangat ingin menemukan sesuatu yang disukai The Inspector. source_doc:
and it's not a bad film — it's a spectacular-looking one in spots — but it is also a film entirely made out of other, better and more thematically cohesive films. so it's 2001 and the three-body problem and arrival and wall-e a little bit, but it's also Quips Sexyman Saves The World Part XVII and ultimately just not that lot

while watching i wondered why the earth needed to be in peril, and if the other two members of the multicultural crew dying to leave the White Man in charge was some kind of an anti-woke statement; but in light of some of the book author andy weir's 'most media literate libertarian' comments about how star trek should be just about spaceships going pew-pew, at least to him the answer is yes to the latter and 'fascism' to the former

@esvrld I read the book a little while back and I may have given him too much credit, especially given his recent decision to open his mouth, but I took the death of the international crew to strand the white boy as an understanding that his second book failed because he is not any good at writing people interacting with each other and his only skill is creating clever little puzzles for his self-insert to solve in complete isolation. Giving him an alien buddy was a good move because it opens the possibility of character interaction without requiring it to resemble the way humans relate to one another

Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Indonesian. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Indonesian translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Indonesian (ind_Latn):
hypo_0:
dan ini bukan film yang buruk — ini terlihat spektakuler di beberapa bagian — tapi ini juga film yang sepenuhnya terbuat dari film-film lain yang lebih baik dan lebih koheren secara tematis. jadi ini adalah 2001 dan masalah tiga tubuh dan kedatangan serta wall-e sedikit, tapi ini juga Quips Sexyman Saves The World Part XVII dan pada akhirnya tidak begitu banyak

saat menonton, saya bertanya-tanya mengapa bumi perlu dalam bahaya, dan jika dua anggota lain dari kru multikultural yang mati untuk membiarkan Orang Putih menguasai adalah semacam pernyataan anti-woke; tetapi mengingat beberapa komentar penulis buku andy weir yang 'paling terdidik media libertarian' tentang bagaimana star trek seharusnya hanya tentang kapal luar angkasa yang pergi pew-pew, setidaknya menurut dia jawabannya adalah ya untuk yang terakhir dan 'fasisme' untuk yang pertama

@esvrld saya membaca bukunya sedikit waktu yang lalu dan saya mungkin telah memberinya terlalu banyak kredit, terutama mengingat keputusannya baru-baru ini untuk membuka mulutnya, tapi saya menganggap kematian kru internasional yang membiarkan anak laki-laki putih itu terdampar sebagai pemahaman bahwa buku keduanya gagal karena dia tidak bagus dalam menulis orang-orang berinteraksi satu sama lain dan satu-satunya kemampuannya adalah menciptakan teka-teki kecil yang cerdas untuk diselesaikan oleh dirinya yang disisipkan dalam isolasi total. Memberinya teman alien adalah langkah yang baik karena itu membuka kemungkinan interaksi karakter tanpa memerlukan itu menyerupai cara manusia berhubungan satu sama lain

source_doc:
right, so, as i was saying, i dmed this very well known and very friendly seeming artist-type person and gave em the usual spiel:
- how bridge works
- how to bridge
- please do so because i want to follow you and reblog some of your stuff that i like
- if you don't want to, that's fine
and they responded "not doing that" which is all well and good but then they blocked me???
just like, for absolutely no fucking reason

not naming any names because i do NOT dislike anybody involved and i certainly do not want to incite any brigading, but this has happened with several people now, including people who have REBLOGGED AND LIKED BRIDGED POSTS FROM THIS ACCOUNT (my main), which is WHY I WANTED TO FOLLOW THEM

if they had just said "no thanks" they would have gotten an "ok, perfectly understandable! :)" or the like from me, but now everyone has to put up with my confused ranting instead. i'm not even angry, i'm just *genuinely baffled*

bsky people, is this a genuine issue over on your platform (because it's one i've almost *never* had over here on this side of the bridge) or am i just running into bad apple after bad apple

I honestly don't know what people's general feelings are about enabling the Bridgy Fed here, because that's just not a topic that ever comes up tbh (unfortunately)… But there's definitely some subset of people here who are super trigger-happy about the block button, I'm not a fan of this either.

hypo_0:
jadi, seperti yang aku bilang, aku DM orang artist yang sangat terkenal dan terlihat ramah ini dan kasih mereka spiel biasa:
- bagaimana bridge bekerja
- bagaimana cara bridging
- tolong lakukan itu karena aku ingin mengikuti kamu dan reblog beberapa karyamu yang aku suka
- jika kamu tidak mau, itu tidak apa-apa
dan mereka menjawab "tidak mau melakukan itu" yang baik-baik saja tapi kemudian mereka memblokirku???
hanya seperti, tanpa alasan yang jelas banget

tidak menyebut nama siapa pun karena aku TIDAK tidak suka dengan orang-orang yang terlibat dan aku pasti tidak ingin memicu keributan, tapi ini sudah terjadi dengan beberapa orang sekarang, termasuk orang-orang yang sudah REBLOG DAN MENYUKAI POST BRIDGED DARI AKUN INI (akun utamaku), yang merupakan ALASAN KENAPA AKU INGIN MENGIKUTI MEREKA

kalau mereka cuma bilang "tidak terima kasih" mereka bakal dapat "oke, sangat bisa dimengerti! :)" atau sejenisnya dariku, tapi sekarang semua orang harus menghadapi omonganku yang bingung ini. aku bahkan tidak marah, aku cuma *benar-benar bingung*

orang bsky, apakah ini masalah serius di platform kalian (karena ini adalah sesuatu yang hampir *tidak pernah* aku alami di sini di sisi jembatan ini) atau aku hanya bertemu dengan apel buruk satu demi satu

aku jujur tidak tahu bagaimana perasaan umum orang-orang tentang mengaktifkan Bridgy Fed di sini, karena itu bukan topik yang pernah dibahas sejujurnya (sayangnya)… Tapi pasti ada sebagian orang di sini yang sangat cepat menekan tombol blok, aku juga tidak suka ini.

aku tidak mau menyebut nama siapapun karena aku TIDAK benci siapapun yang terlibat dan aku jelas tidak mau memicu keributan, tapi ini sudah terjadi dengan beberapa orang sekarang, termasuk mereka yang sudah REBLOG DAN MENYUKAI POST BRIDGED DARI AKUN INI (akun utamaku), jadi itulah ALASAN KENAPA AKU INGIN MENGIKUTI MEREKA

kalau saja mereka bilang "tidak terima kasih" pasti mereka akan mendapatkan "oke, sangat dimengerti! :)" atau semacamnya dariku, tapi sekarang semua orang harus mendengarkan ocehan bingungku ini. aku bahkan tidak marah, aku cuma *benar-benar bingung*

teman-teman bsky, apakah ini benar-benar jadi masalah di platform kalian (karena ini adalah sesuatu yang hampir *tidak pernah* aku alami di sisi jembatan ini) atau aku hanya terus menerus berhadapan dengan apel buruk?

jujur saja, aku tidak tahu bagaimana perasaan umum orang tentang mengaktifkan Bridgy Fed di sini, karena itu bukan topik yang pernah dibahas sejujurnya (sayangnya)… Tapi pasti ada segelintir orang di sini yang gampang banget menekan tombol blok, dan aku juga tidak suka ini.

source_doc:
Good Morning Worlds!
We are going to the tip this morning. It will clear some of the stuff we sorted yesterday from the drive. I don't think we can clear it all unless we took the trailer, but the trailer is full of steel for weighing in.
Later I might carry on packing tote crates.
#GoodMorningWorlds

Tip trip done, and another car load cleared out.
I have taken the new trailer axle, and trailer drive motor system, out of the scrap metal trailer load. That means we can get more scrap metal in there and also not accidentally weigh in the parts I want to keep.
I think, next, I will start moving the scrap steel from the back garden into the trailer so that it is ready to go.
Scrap steel prices are not very high at the moment but better than nothing, if I take enough of it in one go.
Still have to sort the non-ferrous scrap.

That thing when you are taking the rotten tyres off small, wide lawn tractor wheels....
Huge effort to unmount one side of the tyre, but it was really badly rusted tight on the other side of the rim.
In the time it took me to break the bead free, I'd forgotten I had already done the other side, and ended up with the rim free but completely inside the tyre!
I had to remount the tyre that side, and then work around it to get the rim out.
I had to cut up the inner tube to get that out too!
I wonder how many more tyres I need to unmount? Four done so far.

hypo_0:
Selamat Pagi Dunia!
Kita akan pergi ke tempat pembuangan pagi ini. Ini akan membersihkan beberapa barang yang kita sortir kemarin dari mobil. Saya rasa kita tidak bisa membersihkannya semua kecuali kita membawa trailer, tapi trailernya penuh dengan besi untuk di timbang.
Nanti saya mungkin akan melanjutkan mengemas kotak-kotak tote.
#SelamatPagiDunia

Perjalanan ke tempat pembuangan selesai, dan satu mobil lagi sudah dibersihkan.
Saya sudah mengambil sumbu trailer baru, dan sistem motor penggerak trailer, dari muatan trailer besi scrap. Itu berarti kita bisa memasukkan lebih banyak besi scrap di sana dan juga tidak secara tidak sengaja menimbang bagian yang ingin saya simpan.
Saya rasa, selanjutnya, saya akan mulai memindahkan besi scrap dari kebun belakang ke trailer supaya siap untuk dibawa.
Harga besi scrap saat ini tidak terlalu tinggi tapi lebih baik daripada tidak, jika saya membawa cukup banyak sekaligus.
Masih harus menyortir scrap non-ferrous.

Itu saat kamu mencopot ban busuk dari roda traktor rumput kecil yang lebar....
Usaha besar untuk melepaskan satu sisi ban, tapi sangat berkarat di sisi lainnya dari pelek.
Dalam waktu yang saya butuhkan untuk memecahkan bead, saya sudah lupa kalau saya sudah melakukan sisi lainnya, dan akhirnya pelek terlepas tapi sepenuhnya terjebak di dalam ban!
Saya harus memasang kembali ban di sisi itu, dan kemudian bekerja di sekelilingnya untuk mengeluarkan pelek.
Saya juga harus memotong tabung dalam untuk mengeluarkannya!
Saya penasaran berapa banyak ban lagi yang perlu saya lepas? Empat sudah selesai sejauh ini.

source_doc:
:redpanda: sometimes people will ask us like "what if you got a publisher for [game] wouldn't that be wicked?" but the problem is that all that would have to go through our game director, Ashe, who's said she wont speak to any publisher who doesn't address her as Ashe
the second she gets "Jess" the deal ends

:redpanda: and in a world where like, not even the AI slop publishers sending AI emails, but the people who have been flat out rude and some of them like, you could *feel* the misogyny dripping off their email, we're not really interested in talking to any of them lol

:redpanda: (I will shout out the publishers who have reached out to us though who have been like "here's some of the games we've published" and, out of their catalog, they picked out exclusively furry games. at least they did their homework)

:redpanda: anyways if you ever were like "I don't understand why Blobun isn't on switch? it'd be a perfect fit" that's why, and we can't afford the devkit and version of gamemaker that does that export, so yea you gotta go steam deck (or x86-ARM converter on those anbernics) if you want it on the go

:redpanda: kadang orang akan bertanya ke kita kayak "gimana kalau kamu dapat penerbit untuk [game] itu, bukankah itu keren?" tapi masalahnya semua itu harus melalui direktur game kami, Ashe, yang bilang dia nggak mau bicara sama penerbit yang nggak memanggilnya sebagai Ashe
begitu dia dapat "Jess" kesepakatan berakhir

:redpanda: dan di dunia di mana, bahkan penerbit AI yang mengirim email AI saja, tapi orang-orang yang sudah jelas kasar dan beberapa di antara mereka kayak, kamu bisa *merasa* misogini menetes dari email mereka, kita sih nggak tertarik untuk ngobrol sama mereka lol

:redpanda: (Aku akan menyebutkan penerbit yang sudah menghubungi kami sih yang bilang "ini beberapa game yang sudah kami terbitkan" dan, dari katalog mereka, mereka memilih game furry saja. setidaknya mereka melakukan PR mereka)

:redpanda: anyway kalau kamu pernah berpikir "aku nggak mengerti kenapa Blobun nggak ada di switch? ini kan cocok banget" itu alasannya, dan kita nggak bisa beli devkit dan versi gamemaker yang bisa ekspor itu, jadi ya kamu harus pakai steam deck (atau konverter x86-ARM di anbernics itu) kalau mau main di luar

begitu dia dapet "Jess", kesepakatan langsung berakhir

:redpanda: dan di dunia di mana bahkan penerbit AI yang ngirim email AI aja, tapi orang-orang yang udah jelas kasar, dan beberapa di antaranya kayak, kamu bisa *merasakan* misogini menetes dari email mereka, kita sih nggak tertarik untuk ngobrol sama mereka lol

:redpanda: (Tapi aku mau nyebut penerbit yang udah menghubungi kita dan bilang "ini beberapa game yang udah kami terbitkan" dan dari katalog mereka, mereka cuma milih game furry. setidaknya mereka udah melakukan PR mereka)

source_doc:
My brother in He-Who-Shall-Not-Be-Named, what you are describing is a consequence of _misogyny_, not "misandry."

I desperately need men to realize that just because it's directed at them and an actual serious problem doesn't mean it is "misandry."
Just saw someone describe being discriminated against _for being considered effeminate_ as "misandry" and I just.

It's not that you aren't experiencing something real. You very well may be. But it isn't "misandry." Because "misandry" doesn't exist.
Yes, this applies to trans men as well. "Transmisandry" _also_ isn't a thing and just contributes to anti-feminist narratives. It treats itself as a mirror of transmisogyny, but transmisogyny is _intersective_: we experience transphobia _and_ we experience misogyny _and_ we experience this unholy thing that happens when the two interact. It's not a subset, even an exclusive subset, it's an intersection.
But the following all are absolutely problems that can be talked about!
* Transphobia/Transmisia
* Antitransmasculity
* Transemasculation
* Misogyny
It sucks to be discriminated against, but the language that we use is so, so important here.

hypo_0:
Saudara saya dalam He-Who-Shall-Not-Be-Named, apa yang kamu jelaskan adalah akibat dari _misogini_, bukan "misandri."

Saya sangat perlu agar pria menyadari bahwa hanya karena itu ditujukan kepada mereka dan merupakan masalah yang sebenarnya serius, bukan berarti itu "misandri."
Baru saja melihat seseorang menggambarkan didiskriminasi _karena dianggap feminim_ sebagai "misandri" dan saya hanya.

Bukan berarti kamu tidak mengalami sesuatu yang nyata. Kamu mungkin saja mengalaminya. Tapi itu bukan "misandri." Karena "misandri" tidak ada.
Ya, ini juga berlaku untuk pria trans. "Transmisandri" _juga_ bukan hal dan hanya berkontribusi pada narasi anti-feminist. Itu memperlakukan dirinya sendiri sebagai cermin dari transmisogini, tapi transmisogini itu _interseksi_: kita mengalami transphobia _dan_ kita mengalami misogini _dan_ kita mengalami hal tidak suci yang terjadi ketika dua hal itu berinteraksi. Ini bukan subset, bahkan subset eksklusif, ini adalah interseksi.
Tapi semua hal berikut adalah masalah yang pasti bisa dibicarakan!
* Transphobia/Transmisia
* Antitransmaskulinitas
* Transemaskulasi
* Misogini
Menyebalkan menjadi korban diskriminasi, tapi bahasa yang kita gunakan sangat, sangat penting di sini.

Tapi semua hal berikut ini benar-benar masalah yang bisa dibahas!
* Transphobia/Transmisia
* Antitransmaskulinitas
* Transemaskulasi
* Misogini
Menyebalkan banget didiskriminasi, tapi bahasa yang kita gunakan di sini sangat, sangat penting.

source_doc:
project move out, spring break relay
day 1:
Cleared main bedroom closet
& contents of boxes on one wall.
I'm surveying all my belongings. Pulling out a small percentage to save. Sentimental items. Practical pieces for putting together a new life. At this stage I know I'm selecting more than I need, probably more than I can carry; but the amount that I'm leaving behind is far greater. Deciding what to keep & where comes after the survey. All the rest will be turned over to "scavengers."
#moverR

Day 2, midday break, Monday.
Today is harder than yesterday. I'm uncovering far more "sentimental" stuff. The challenge: these saved memories are a physical drag that impair rather than contribute anything practically to my future AND I feel integrated looking at them. There's a strong general condemnation, I feel, of holding onto sentimental items. Yet I know that they are powerful. But hey, I'm an artist. Even wistful, sad memories are valuable to me. I'm proceeding as before, retaining less+

+than I'm tossing, while knowing that I am keeping "too much." The next phase will be the actual moving & storing phase when more might be cut. This phase is the pre-screen before turning the cleared items over to others who will take everything away.
File under: how to move out of a home of 12 years & a home town of 45 years, with family roots here (& artifacts) from 150 years. I'm finally leaving, in search of a culture that suits my values.
#moverR

hypo_0:
proyek pindahan, relai liburan musim semi
hari 1:
Sudah membersihkan lemari utama di kamar tidur
& isi kotak di satu dinding.
Aku sedang menelaah semua barangku. Mengeluarkan sedikit untuk disimpan. Barang-barang yang berkesan. Barang-barang praktis untuk membangun kehidupan baru. Di tahap ini aku tahu aku memilih lebih dari yang aku butuhkan, mungkin lebih dari yang bisa aku bawa; tapi jumlah yang akan kutinggalkan jauh lebih besar. Memutuskan apa yang akan disimpan & di mana akan datang setelah survei. Semua sisanya akan diserahkan kepada "pencari barang."
#moverR

Hari 2, istirahat siang, Senin.
Sekarang lebih sulit daripada kemarin. Aku menemukan jauh lebih banyak barang "berkesan". Tantangannya: kenangan yang disimpan ini adalah beban fisik yang menghalangi daripada memberi kontribusi praktis untuk masa depanku DAN aku merasa terintegrasi saat melihatnya. Ada kecaman umum yang kuat, aku rasa, terhadap memegang barang-barang sentimental. Tapi aku tahu bahwa barang-barang itu kuat. Tapi hey, aku seorang seniman. Bahkan kenangan yang penuh kerinduan dan sedih pun berharga bagiku. Aku melanjutkan seperti sebelumnya, menyimpan lebih sedikit+

+daripada yang aku buang, sambil tahu bahwa aku menyimpan "terlalu banyak." Tahap berikutnya akan menjadi fase pindahan & penyimpanan yang sebenarnya ketika lebih banyak bisa dipangkas. Fase ini adalah pra-skrining sebelum menyerahkan barang-barang yang sudah dibersihkan kepada orang lain yang akan mengambil semuanya.
Kategori: bagaimana cara pindah dari rumah selama 12 tahun & kota asal selama 45 tahun, dengan akar keluarga di sini (& artefak) dari 150 tahun. Aku akhirnya pergi, mencari budaya yang sesuai dengan nilai-nilainya.
#moverR

source_doc:
$partner has a video consult with Ikea to quote for a fitted kitchen. It's a fascinating glimpse into the ecosystem of online services for boomers.
1. They send link for video consult, three weeks ago. It uses Ikea's proprietary videoconf solution
2. They request the designs & 3D renders for the new kitchen
3. they send an email saying "thanks for sending through the design
4. We dial in today, they start the call with "our system blocked your files, let's design your kitchen together"
1/x

5. Partner asks if there's any way to share the (very detailed, took us like a full man week to put together) designs, but the Ikea salesdrone is on a script, and isn't having a bar of it.
6. The next step in the script is "laboriously do the design from scratch over the phone with the client, hunting and pecking on the keyboard and not fast using the UI of their design software"
2/x

7. They cannot share their screen, so it's a clown show of repeated misunderstanding about which part of which image is being referred to

8. the clock has just ticked past what should have been the full consult, and they're 35% the way thru getting the required measurements.

9. So far there's been literally 8 minutes of salesdrone laboriously inputting the measurements supplied

hypo_0:
$partner sudah konsultasi video dengan Ikea untuk mendapatkan penawaran dapur yang terpasang. Ini adalah sekilas yang menarik tentang ekosistem layanan online untuk generasi boomer.
1. Mereka mengirimkan tautan untuk konsultasi video, tiga minggu yang lalu. Ini menggunakan solusi videokonferensi milik Ikea
2. Mereka meminta desain & render 3D untuk dapur baru
3. Mereka mengirim email yang mengatakan "terima kasih telah mengirim desain
4. Kami telepon hari ini, mereka mulai panggilan dengan "sistem kami memblokir file Anda, mari kita desain dapur Anda bersama-sama"
1/x

5. Partner bertanya apakah ada cara untuk berbagi desain (yang sangat detail, butuh waktu kami seperti seminggu penuh untuk menyusunnya), tetapi penjual Ikea hanya mengikuti skrip, dan tidak mau menerima.
6. Langkah berikutnya dalam skrip adalah "mengerjakan desain dari awal lewat telepon dengan klien, mengekspresikan dengan susah payah di keyboard dan tidak cepat menggunakan UI dari perangkat lunak desain mereka"
2/x

7. Mereka tidak bisa berbagi layar mereka, jadi ini jadi pertunjukan badut dengan kesalahpahaman berulang tentang bagian mana dari gambar mana yang dimaksud

8. Jam baru saja melewati waktu yang seharusnya menjadi konsultasi penuh, dan mereka baru mencapai 35% dalam mendapatkan ukuran yang diperlukan.

source_doc:
Tinkering with my stereo system this week has got me thinking about an oddity that I've never been able to get to the bottom of...let's see if the Mastodon hive mine can help.
The amp is a Philips FA454 and the CD Player is a Philips CD150.
According to the amp manual I can connect the units with a "8-pole DIN to 5-pole DIN + 2 x single-pole CINCH" cable."
I take this to mean an 8 pin din to a 5 pin + stereo RCA cable...which sounds cursed.
Never been able to find one. Can anyone make one?

The service manual for the amp is nice and clear (picture 2 in above toot), but I can't find anything as nice for the CD player. I've attached a picture (picture 4 in the above toot) from the service manual that I *think* is the relevant section.
Currently I have the CD player hooked up with just the RCA cables and it all works fine, but if I could find/make the correct Din to Din + RCA cable then I could use some additional functionality and free up the only RCA stereo inputs on my amp.

There's a repair café this weekend in the town where I live...if I'm still puzzling over it all by then I might take it all along there and see if they can help me hack together a cable.

Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Indonesian (ind_Latn):
hypo_0:
Ngoprek-ngoprek sistem stereo saya minggu ini bikin saya mikir tentang suatu keanehan yang belum pernah bisa saya pecahkan... mari kita lihat apakah komunitas Mastodon bisa membantu.
Ampli-nya adalah Philips FA454 dan Pemutar CD-nya adalah Philips CD150.
Menurut manual ampli, saya bisa menghubungkan unit-unit ini dengan kabel "8-pole DIN ke 5-pole DIN + 2 x single-pole CINCH".
Saya mengartikan ini sebagai kabel 8 pin din ke 5 pin + stereo RCA... yang terdengar sial.
Belum pernah bisa menemukan satu pun. Ada yang bisa buatkan satu?

Manual servis untuk ampli ini jelas dan rapi (gambar 2 di atas), tapi saya tidak bisa menemukan yang serapih itu untuk pemutar CD. Saya sudah melampirkan gambar (gambar 4 di atas) dari manual servis yang saya *rasa* adalah bagian yang relevan.
Saat ini saya sudah menghubungkan pemutar CD hanya dengan kabel RCA dan semuanya berfungsi dengan baik, tapi kalau saya bisa menemukan/membuat kabel Din ke Din + RCA yang benar, saya bisa menggunakan fungsi tambahan dan membebaskan satu-satunya input stereo RCA di ampli saya.

Ada kafe perbaikan akhir pekan ini di kota tempat saya tinggal... jika saya masih bingung dengan semua ini saat itu, saya mungkin akan bawa semuanya ke sana dan lihat apakah mereka bisa membantu saya merakit kabel.

Manual servis untuk ampli ini jelas dan mudah dipahami (lihat gambar 2 di atas), tetapi saya belum menemukan yang sebaik itu untuk pemutar CD. Saya sudah lampirkan gambar (gambar 4 di atas) dari manual servis yang saya *rasakan* adalah bagian yang relevan.
Saat ini, saya sudah menghubungkan pemutar CD hanya dengan kabel RCA saja dan semuanya berjalan baik, tetapi jika saya bisa menemukan/membuat kabel Din ke Din + RCA yang tepat, saya bisa memanfaatkan beberapa fitur tambahan dan membebaskan satu-satunya input stereo RCA di ampli saya.

Ada kafe perbaikan akhir pekan ini di kota tempat saya tinggal... jika saya masih bingung dengan semuanya nanti, mungkin saya akan bawa semua ke sana dan lihat apakah mereka bisa bantu saya merakit kabelnya.

source_doc:
Local stable out to cash in at Coffs with four contenders

Local trainer Noel Mayfield-Smith is hoping to have a lucrative day at Sunday's Coffs Harbour meeting with four runners stepping out for the stable on the six-race card.

The Group 1-winning horseman will start his day in the second event of the day when Ausbred Yahoo contests the Komatsu Country Boosted Benchmark 58 Handicap (1605m) with two-kilogram claiming apprentice Ella Drew taking the ride.

Racing returns to Coffs Harbour on Sunday.

Ausbred Yahoo has been racing in good form with a third placing at Kempsey three starts ago being followed by two successive seconds at Coffs Harbour, the latest when beaten by Sunday's rival Caledonian.

Mayfield-Smith links with another apprentice, three-kilogram claimer Leanne Boyd, when Never Island starts in the Insurance Advisernet Australia Pink Silks F&M Benchmark 58 Handicap (1305m).

A winner of three of her 15 starts, Never Island will carry 59.5 kilograms after Boyd's allowance. Never Island was beaten less than a length when second behind Montgomery at Grafton and backed that up with a last-start fifth at Coffs Harbour behind In The Fine Print when again beaten less than a length.

Raymond Spokes takes the ride on the Mayfield-Smith-prepared Monte Cruise in the O'Brien Plumbing Relining Wayne Glenn Pink Silks Cup Benchmark 82 Handicap (1205m).

Monte Cruise is also a three-time winner from just the nine starts. She hasn't raced since July when finishing last of eight at Eagle Farm and has had two trials at this track in preparation for her return, finishing second behind Saturday's Wyong winner Petticoat before winning the latest of them.

Mayfield-Smith rounds out the day when he again links with Boyd when she rides Cardsharp in the Key Community Group C,G&E Benchmark 58 Handicap (1305m).

Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Indonesian grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is a news article. Ensure the translation is formal and consistent with journalistic standards. Please translate the following text into Indonesian (ind_Latn):
hypo_0:
Pelatih lokal Noel Mayfield-Smith berharap dapat meraih keuntungan di pertemuan Coffs Harbour pada hari Minggu dengan empat pelari yang tampil untuk stabel dalam enam balapan.

Jockey pemenang Grup 1 ini akan memulai harinya di acara kedua saat Ausbred Yahoo berlomba di Handicap Benchmark 58 Komatsu Country Boosted (1605m) dengan pembalap magang Ella Drew yang mengklaim dua kilogram.

Balapan kembali ke Coffs Harbour pada hari Minggu.

Ausbred Yahoo telah berlari dalam performa baik dengan peringkat ketiga di Kempsey tiga balapan lalu diikuti oleh dua posisi kedua berturut-turut di Coffs Harbour, yang terakhir saat kalah dari pesaing hari Minggu, Caledonian.

Mayfield-Smith akan bekerja sama dengan magang lainnya, Leanne Boyd, yang mengklaim tiga kilogram saat Never Island berlomba di Handicap Benchmark 58 Pink Silks Asuransi Advisernet Australia (1305m).

Dengan tiga kemenangan dari 15 start, Never Island akan membawa 59,5 kilogram setelah pengurangan Boyd. Never Island kalah kurang dari satu panjang saat berada di posisi kedua di belakang Montgomery di Grafton dan mengulangi itu dengan posisi kelima terakhir di Coffs Harbour di belakang In The Fine Print saat lagi-lagi kalah kurang dari satu panjang.

Raymond Spokes akan mengendarai Monte Cruise yang disiapkan Mayfield-Smith di Handicap Benchmark 82 O'Brien Plumbing Relining Wayne Glenn Pink Silks Cup (1205m).

Monte Cruise juga merupakan pemenang tiga kali dari sembilan start. Dia belum berlomba sejak bulan Juli ketika finis terakhir dari delapan di Eagle Farm dan telah menjalani dua percobaan di trek ini sebagai persiapan untuk kembalinya, finis kedua di belakang pemenang Wyong Sabtu Petticoat sebelum memenangkan percobaan terbarunya.

Mayfield-Smith menyelesaikan hari tersebut saat ia kembali bekerja sama dengan Boyd saat dia mengendarai Cardsharp di Handicap Benchmark 58 Key Community Group C,G&E (1305m).

Dia belum berlaga sejak Juli ketika finis terakhir dari delapan di Eagle Farm dan telah menjalani dua percobaan di trek ini sebagai persiapan untuk kembalinya, finis kedua di belakang pemenang Wyong Sabtu, Petticoat, sebelum berhasil menang pada percobaan terbarunya.

Mayfield-Smith menutup hari tersebut dengan kembali bekerja sama dengan Boyd saat dia mengendarai Cardsharp di Handicap Benchmark 58 Key Community Group C,G&E (1305m).

source_doc:
Reading Gloria Steinem's undercover report on being a Playboy Bunny... finished Part I and damn🤔
Despite being well aware of Playboy being uh... a CORPORATION lol... had no idea how much their entire infrastructure truly served to perpetuate classism in an extremely creepy way while outwardly presenting themselves as the "classy" and thus "more ethical" option compared to say, Hustler

I'll post some screenshots later but to give you the gist, Bunnies (who were cocktail waitresses), had to:
- accept lower (by $200-150, equivalent to today's $2.5K) wages than advertised
- hand over 50% of all their tips
- give their last names to "Number 1 key holders" (ergo, celebrities/elites) if asked
- be subjected to a pelvic exam and blood test but weren't allowed to pick the physician
- be spied on by a private eye
- go out if their way to hide their husbands/bfs

The central point that unites all of this:
Bunnies were STRICTLY NOT ALLOWED TO (penalized by termination) date any other employees or customers... BUT accompanying and dating the "Number 1 key holders" was permitted, if not encouraged. See where this is going?

New recruits were given a "Bunny Bible" to study all those bizarre rules and instructions from.
To mention a few more:
- Bunnies' work performance was assessed by a "merit system" (YES, that exact wording!) instead of being written up. Unsurprisingly, merit was not only judged by a good work ethic but also very specific requirements on looks and attitude.
- there was an incentive system in place that rewarded Bunnies who sold the most liquor and merchandise

hypo_0:
Membaca laporan bawah tanah Gloria Steinem tentang menjadi Playboy Bunny... selesai di Bagian I dan sial🤔
Walaupun sudah tahu bahwa Playboy itu uh... sebuah KORPORASI lol... aku nggak nyangka seberapa jauh infrastruktur mereka sebenarnya melanggengkan kelas sosial dengan cara yang sangat menyeramkan sambil tampil di luar sebagai opsi "kelas" dan dengan demikian "lebih etis" dibandingkan dengan misalnya, Hustler

Aku akan posting beberapa tangkapan layar nanti tapi untuk memberi kamu intinya, Bunnies (yang merupakan pelayan koktail), harus:
- menerima gaji lebih rendah (sekitar $200-150, setara dengan $2.5K saat ini) dari yang diiklankan
- menyerahkan 50% dari semua tip mereka
- memberikan nama belakang mereka kepada "pemegang kunci Nomor 1" (karena itu, selebriti/elites) jika diminta
- menjalani pemeriksaan panggul dan tes darah tetapi tidak diizinkan memilih dokter
- diawasi oleh seorang detektif swasta
- berusaha keras untuk menyembunyikan suami/pasangan mereka

Poin utama yang menyatukan semua ini:
Bunnies sangat TIDAK DIBOLEHKAN (dapat dihukum dengan pemecatan) berkencan dengan karyawan atau pelanggan lainnya... TAPI menemani dan berkencan dengan "pemegang kunci Nomor 1" diperbolehkan, bahkan dianjurkan. Mengerti kan?

Rekrutan baru diberikan "Alkitab Bunny" untuk mempelajari semua aturan dan instruksi aneh itu.
Untuk menyebutkan beberapa lagi:
- Kinerja kerja Bunnies dinilai dengan "sistem merit" (YA, kata-kata itu persis!) daripada ditulis pelanggaran. Tak mengejutkan, prestasi tidak hanya dinilai dari etos kerja yang baik tapi juga dari persyaratan yang sangat spesifik mengenai penampilan dan sikap.
- ada sistem insentif yang diberlakukan yang memberikan penghargaan kepada Bunnies yang menjual alkohol dan barang dagangan paling banyak

source_doc:
@JugglingWithEggs at least in my friend circle mobile phones not uncommon from early 90s, but they cost a *lot* to call from a landline (so if you were living at home your parents would discourage it), and until 1995-1999 were insecure, anyone with a radio scanner could (and often did) listen to them.
Whilst radio scanners were out of the price range of youths, many older folk had them, and until late 90s were often the kind of radio enthusiast who was a Tory bootlicker and supported the Police and other Establishment organisations, so you if discussing anything subversive on a mobile phone you risked being grassed up..
Ironically the tide turned by late 90s when scanners became affordable, and the Police were still on analogue radios 😁

@JugglingWithEggs by late 1990s everyone had a mobile phone and calls were cheaper (often with a good amount of free minutes) but SMS messages were unreliable and initially didn't even work across networks - people actually talked to each other on them!
One difference was access to physical spaces wasn't as heavily controlled as today - even though there was still CCTV and locals would call old bill on youths "hanging around", there was neither sufficient boots on the ground nor interconnected CCTV (a real security guard had to watch the footage locally, and property owners generally didn't want to pay for these folk at evenings and weekends.
There were also fewer cops on duty in outer suburbs during nights/weekends - they were all deployed into the town centres)

@vfrmedia
I remember texts sometimes taking hours to come through in the early noughties - so not always great for making on the fly arrangements.
Living in market town definitely meant less cctv and coppers back in 90’s. Remember difference when heading out into Bournemouth or Norwich of an evening. But young people having fun wasn’t frowned upon like it is now. My earlier post about facial recognition was about area where there has been uptick in teens just hanging out.
instruction: You are a professional Indonesian translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Indonesian (ind_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Indonesian grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Indonesian. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Indonesian translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Indonesian (ind_Latn):
hypo_0:
@JugglingWithEggs setidaknya di lingkaran teman-temanku, ponsel sudah ada sejak awal 90-an, tapi biayanya *mahal* banget untuk menelepon dari telepon rumah (jadi kalau kamu tinggal di rumah, orang tuamu pasti melarangnya), dan sampai tahun 1995-1999 ponsel itu tidak aman, siapa pun yang punya pemindai radio bisa (dan sering kali melakukan) mendengarnya.
Saat itu, pemindai radio di luar jangkauan harga bagi anak muda, banyak orang tua yang memilikinya, dan hingga akhir 90-an, mereka biasanya adalah penggemar radio yang merupakan penjilat Tory dan mendukung Polisi dan organisasi-organisasi Establishment lainnya, jadi jika berdiskusi tentang hal yang subversif di ponsel, kamu berisiko dibocorkan..
Ironisnya, situasi berubah di akhir 90-an ketika pemindai jadi terjangkau, dan Polisi masih menggunakan radio analog 😁

@JugglingWithEggs pada akhir 1990-an, semua orang punya ponsel dan biaya telepon jadi lebih murah (sering kali dengan banyak menit gratis) tapi SMS tidak dapat diandalkan dan pada awalnya bahkan tidak berfungsi di seluruh jaringan - orang benar-benar berbicara satu sama lain menggunakan ponsel!
Salah satu perbedaannya adalah akses ke ruang fisik tidak dikontrol seketat sekarang - meskipun masih ada CCTV dan warga sering menghubungi Polisi tentang anak-anak muda yang "nongkrong", tidak ada cukup petugas di lapangan dan CCTV terhubung (seorang petugas keamanan yang nyata harus menonton rekaman secara lokal, dan pemilik properti umumnya tidak ingin membayar orang-orang ini di malam hari dan akhir pekan.
Juga ada lebih sedikit polisi yang bertugas di pinggiran kota saat malam/hari libur - mereka semua dikerahkan ke pusat kota)

@vfrmedia
Aku ingat kadang-kadang SMS bisa memakan waktu berjam-jam untuk sampai di awal 2000-an - jadi tidak selalu bagus untuk membuat rencana secara mendadak.
Tinggal di kota pasar pasti berarti lebih sedikit CCTV dan polisi di tahun 90-an. Ingat perbedaannya saat pergi ke Bournemouth atau Norwich di malam hari. Tapi orang muda bersenang-senang tidak dipandang sebelah mata seperti sekarang. Postingan sebelumnya tentang pengenalan wajah itu tentang daerah di mana ada peningkatan remaja yang hanya nongkrong.

@JugglingWithEggs pada akhir 1990-an, semua orang sudah memiliki ponsel dan biaya telepon jadi lebih murah (seringkali dengan banyak menit gratis) tetapi SMS seringkali tidak dapat diandalkan dan awalnya bahkan tidak berfungsi antar jaringan - orang benar-benar berbicara satu sama lain di ponsel!
Salah satu perbedaannya adalah akses ke ruang fisik tidak seketat sekarang - meskipun masih ada CCTV dan warga setempat sering melaporkan Polisi tentang anak muda yang "nongkrong", tidak ada cukup petugas di lapangan dan CCTV yang terhubung (seorang petugas keamanan sejati harus menonton rekaman secara lokal, dan pemilik properti umumnya tidak mau membayar orang-orang ini di malam hari dan akhir pekan.
Selain itu, jumlah polisi yang bertugas di pinggiran kota saat malam dan akhir pekan juga lebih sedikit - mereka semua dikerahkan ke pusat kota)
